name: shopify-theme-dev
description: Shopify Liquid theme toolkit for the Hair Solutions Co. storefront (hairsolutions.co, Horizon 4.1.1). GitHub-synced Main/Dev release workflow (no Shopify CLI, no dev server), single Color Palette + design system, Cloudinary AssetLink media, metaobjects/metafields, custom product options, the advanced custom-order picker, and the custom Help Center. Includes Brand-Compliance, SEO, and Mobile-First agents.
